title: Frames
description: A mod that adds random features to Minecraft. Currently abandoned.
body:
///作者没有找到换行功能,凑合看吧

///因为MCreator问题，模组现已停更，后期可能以KubeJS脚本而非独立模组方式延续此Mod.

///Because of MCreator crash, the mod is now abandoned and will not update. I will consider continuing the mod as a KubeJS file instead of a .jar mod.

### About the mod / 关于模组
Frames is a mod with a meaningless title that adds random features such as building blocks, colorful ingots, tools with special effects, and lots more. This mod is made using the MCreator application. The Author said that he will never add GUIs, or he will be striken by lightning(with fire protection). /
本模组使用一个作者脑子一拍想出来的毫无意义的名称，添加了诸如建筑方块、更多锭、各有不同特效的工具等元素。本模组使用MCreator制作。作者已发誓永不添加GUI界面，否则天打雷劈(有火焰保护)。
[https://mcreator.net/](https://mcreator.net/)

### Compatability
No bugs when running with most other mods.
Only the crafting, smelting, stonecutting, brewing recipes in this mod will show up in JEI and is changeable by KubeJS. Other recipes, like Alloying, is not visible and not changeable.
Use a mod called Ploymorph to solve the problems of crafting recipes coinciding with other mods.[https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph)

### 与其他模组搭配
本模组与绝大部分其他模组同时运行时不会崩溃.
会在JEI中显示，且可以被KubeJS修改的只有合成、熔炼、切石、炼药配方，其他新增配方，比如"合金"，不会显示.
当此模组配方与其他模组重复时，Polymorph模组可以使玩家选择使用哪个配方.[https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph)

### External Links / B站模组介绍链接
it seems like Modrinth does not approve Bilibili links in "Bug report" and "Wiki page". Therefore I put the links here.[https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1is87eyEXH/?spm_id_from=333.999.0.0](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1is87eyEXH/?spm_id_from=333.999.0.0)
